changelog: Security + restore fixes: notice-board.js TYPE_CFG lookup hardened with hasOwnProperty (prototype pollution prevention); visitor-form.html session-store.js added; supabase-sync.js student restore recalculates paid/due from full ledger; vercel.json Content-Security-Policy HTTP header added; manifest.json icon entries deduplicated (any+maskable combined); AUDIT.md changelog table structure fixed; jsconfig.json excludes types.js and js/lib explicitly.
